name: token-optimizer-mcp
version_checked: 2026-06-10 (npm stale since 2025-11; repo still active — consider building from source)
notes: MCP server with caching + compression. CAUTION: its npm postinstall writes hooks into the user's Claude settings — install it inside a container or with HOME/CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR redirected, capture the hooks + MCP entry it writes, transcribe them here, then mark verified:true.
